mapper.select: select count(*) from post where p_Type='V'
select p.*, u.user_name from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p_number = #{pNumber}

select count(*) from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.p_type = 'V' and ( p.p_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or p.contents like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or u.user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
